name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new script, report, or improvement

labels: enhancement

## Area
Which part of the suite does this relate to?
- [ ] AuditSuite (new report or improvement to an existing one)
- [ ] AccountManagement
- [ ] GroupManagement
- [ ] EasyPIM / OnboardingPIM
- [ ] Infrastructure
- [ ] New script / new folder

## Description
A clear description of what you'd like to see added or changed.

## Problem it solves
What gap or pain point does this address?

## Suggested approach
If you have an idea of how it could be implemented, describe it here. Otherwise leave blank.

## Additional context
Any relevant Microsoft documentation, Graph API endpoints, or examples.
